_readme: v7 + QA 수동 확정 (무음 라인 제거)
title: read in a glance

sentences.en: Okay, you guys have to remember,
★ the homepage has to read in a glance.
Also, you have to get back like this if you want to see what it looks like if you're, like, over 35.
sentences.ko: 그리고 35세 이상이 보면 어떻게 보이는지 알고 싶으면 이렇게 물러나서 봐야 해요.
